justification: All pass criteria met: both terminology mismatches (session/token and suspended/locked) identified and explicitly mapped in terminology_alignment section with origin notes; both ACs present with exact error codes SESSION_EXPIRED and ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED preserved; architecture details include Redis TTL 1800 and last_accessed_at field.

observations.text: terminology_alignment section explicitly maps both pairs with clear attribution to Bird (domain) vs MJ (technical)
Both exact error codes SESSION_EXPIRED and ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED preserved throughout ACs and architecture guidance
Redis TTL 1800 and last_accessed_at field included in architecture guidance
contradictions_resolved section correctly distinguishes the storage attribute vs API contract concern
Domain rules annotate terminology inline (e.g., 'session (implemented as a token)') so Shaq sees the bridge in context
Open questions are thoughtful and identify genuine ambiguities (token format, last_accessed_at storage, TTL debounce)
